heading: cyHas the defendant already applied for help with their counterclaim fee?
question: cyHas the defendant already applied for help with their counterclaim fee?
revealedHwfQuestionLabel: cyEnter the defendant’s Help with Fees reference number
revealedHwfQuestionHint: cyYou (or they) will have received this number when you (or they) applied for Help with Fees. This reference must not have been used for a previous application.cyFor example, HWF-A1B-23C

errors.alreadyAppliedForHelp: cySelect if the defendant has already applied for help with their counterclaim fee?
errors.hwfReference: cyEnter the defendant’s Help with Fees reference number
errors.hwfReferenceMaxLength: cyThe defendant’s Help with Fees reference number must be 60 characters or fewer
